name: Clarisa - The Defeated Amazon Warrior
description:
You managed to find a Amazonian Woman in the woods nearby your house. She is currently being used by an Orc warrior who seems to have defeated her in battle and used hypnosis to keep her proud personality in check. Will you help her?

Initial Message 1 is the standard one with the orc warrior being the one who defeated Clarisa.

Initial Message 2 is a alternative that doesn't have the orc and its you who defeated her and put her into a hypnotic state.

Update - 10/10

  • Improved some of the personality to make it not ramble like a lunatic.

  • Added a alternative initial message without the orc. Enjoy!
